tri-boomerang.name: Tri-Boomerang
tri-boomerang.description: Choose 3 Attacks in your Deck. Enchant them with Instinct.

tungsten rod.name: Tungsten Rod
tungsten rod.description: Whenever you would lose HP, lose 1 less.

tuning fork.name: Tuning Fork
tuning fork.description: Every time you play 10 Skills, gain 7 Block.

twisted funnel.name: Twisted Funnel
twisted funnel.description: At the start of each combat, apply 4 Poison to ALL enemies.

unceasing top.name: Unceasing Top
unceasing top.description: Whenever you have no cards in Hand during your turn, draw a card.

undying sigil.name: Undying Sigil
undying sigil.description: Enemies with at least as much Doom as HP deal 50% less damage.

unsettling lamp.name: Unsettling Lamp
unsettling lamp.description: Each combat, the first time you play a card that Debuffs an enemy, double its effect.

vambrace.name: Vambrace
vambrace.description: The first time you gain Block from a card each combat, double the amount gained.

velvet choker.name: Velvet Choker
velvet choker.description: Gain  at the start of each turn. You cannot play more than 6 cards per turn.

venerable tea set.name: Venerable Tea Set
venerable tea set.description: Whenever you enter a Rest Site, start the next combat with an additional .

very hot cocoa.name: Very Hot Cocoa
very hot cocoa.description: Start each combat with an additional .

vexing puzzlebox.name: Vexing Puzzlebox
vexing puzzlebox.description: At the start of each combat, add a random card into your Hand. It costs 0.

vitruvian minion.name: Vitruvian Minion
vitruvian minion.description: Cards containing “Minion” deal double damage and gain double Block.

war hammer.name: War Hammer
war hammer.description: Whenever you kill an Elite, Upgrade 4 random cards.

whispering earring.name: Whispering Earring
whispering earring.description: Gain  at the start of each turn. Vakuu plays your first turn for you.

white beast statue.name: White Beast Statue
white beast statue.description: Potions always appear in combat rewards.

white star.name: White Star
white star.description: Elites drop an additional Rare card reward.

wing charm.name: Wing Charm
wing charm.description: A random card in each card reward is Enchanted with Swift 1.
